description: Escape to the breathtaking landscapes of Queenstown, New Zealand, where adventure and the magic of Middle-earth collide. This 6-day family itinerary is designed for those who wish to explore the stunning scenery that served as the backdrop for the iconic 'Lord of the Rings' films, while also indulging in local culture and activities that will delight both young and old. From thrilling outdoor adventures to cozy evenings filled with family bonding, your journey through this enchanting region will be unforgettable.

activities.description: Start your day with a hearty breakfast at Vudu Cafe, known for its delicious coffee and fresh, locally sourced ingredients. The atmosphere is cozy, perfect for families!

Stroll through the beautiful Queenstown Gardens, where you can enjoy stunning views of Lake Wakatipu and the surrounding mountains. The gardens are perfect for a leisurely walk and have plenty of space for kids to play.

Indulge in one of the best burgers in New Zealand at Fergburger. This iconic eatery offers a variety of gourmet burgers that are sure to satisfy the whole family. Be prepared for a bit of a wait, but it's worth it!
Experience New Zealand's unique wildlife at the Kiwi Birdlife Park. This conservation park is home to native birds, including the famous kiwi. It's an educational and fun experience for the kids!

activities.activity: Shopping for Lord of the Rings Merchandise
activities.description: Head to the local shops to find exclusive Lord of the Rings merchandise. From collectibles to clothing, there are plenty of options for fans of the series. Don't forget to check out the themed souvenirs!
Enjoy a cozy dinner at The Cow, a family-friendly restaurant known for its delicious pizzas and pasta. The rustic atmosphere and hearty meals make it a great spot to end your day.

days.title: Lord of the Rings Film Locations Tour

activities.description: Start your day with a hearty breakfast at Vudu Cafe, known for its delicious pancakes and fresh coffee. The cozy atmosphere is perfect for families, and the kids will love the sweet treats on the menu.

Take a scenic drive to Glenorchy, a picturesque village that served as a filming location for many scenes in the Lord of the Rings. The stunning landscapes will leave you in awe, and it's a great opportunity for family photos.
Once in Glenorchy, explore the charming town and its surroundings. Don't miss the chance to visit the iconic Glenorchy Wharf, where you can enjoy breathtaking views of the mountains and lake.
Enjoy a relaxing lunch at Glenorchy Cafe, where you can savor local dishes made from fresh ingredients. The cafe has a welcoming vibe, perfect for families.
Head to Paradise, a stunning location used in the Lord of the Rings films. The lush landscapes and serene environment are perfect for a family hike or a leisurely stroll.

Explore the areas around Glenorchy that were transformed into Isengard and Lothlórien in the films. The towering mountains and ancient trees create a magical atmosphere that will delight both kids and adults.
Drive back to Queenstown, enjoying the scenic views along the way. This is a great time to reflect on the day's adventures and plan for dinner.
End your day with a family dinner at The Cow, a cozy restaurant known for its delicious pizzas and rustic charm. It's a great place to unwind after a day of exploration.

activities.activity: Shopping for Lord of the Rings Merchandise
activities.description: After dinner, take some time to explore Queenstown's shops for Lord of the Rings merchandise. You'll find a variety of collectibles and souvenirs to take home as a reminder of your adventure.
activities.searchQuery: Lord of the Rings merchandise Queenstown

days.title: Adventure Day: Shotover Jet and Skyline Gondola

activities.description: Start your day with a hearty breakfast at Vudu Cafe, known for its delicious coffee and fresh, locally sourced ingredients. The pancakes and eggs benedict are particularly popular with families!
Experience the thrill of the Shotover Jet, a high-speed boat ride through the stunning Shotover River canyons. This adrenaline-pumping adventure is perfect for families looking for excitement!
After your jet ride, take some time to explore the beautiful surroundings of the Shotover River. Enjoy the breathtaking views and capture some family photos in this picturesque setting.
Enjoy a cozy lunch at The Cow Restaurant, famous for its delicious pizzas and rustic atmosphere. It's a great spot for families to relax and refuel after the morning's excitement.
Take a scenic gondola ride up to Bob's Peak for stunning panoramic views of Queenstown and the surrounding mountains. This is a must-do for any family visiting the area!
Experience the fun of the Luge at Skyline Queenstown! Race down the winding tracks with your family and enjoy the thrill of this unique downhill ride.

activities.activity: Shopping for Lord of the Rings Merchandise
activities.description: Head to the local shops in Queenstown to find exclusive Lord of the Rings merchandise. From collectibles to clothing, there’s something for every fan in the family!
End your day with a delightful dinner at Botswana Butchery, where you can enjoy a range of delicious dishes made from local ingredients. The atmosphere is perfect for families!

Start your day with a hearty breakfast at Vudu Cafe, known for its delicious coffee and fresh, locally sourced ingredients. The cozy atmosphere makes it a perfect spot for families to fuel up before a day of exploration.

Take a scenic drive to Arrowtown, a charming historic gold mining town. Stroll along the picturesque streets lined with preserved buildings from the 1860s, and don't miss the chance to explore the local shops for unique souvenirs and Lord of the Rings memorabilia.

activities.activity: Lunch at The Fork and Tap
activities.description: Enjoy a family-friendly lunch at The Fork and Tap, where you can savor classic Kiwi dishes made with fresh, local ingredients. The relaxed atmosphere is perfect for families, and there's a great selection of craft beers for the adults.

Discover the rich history of Arrowtown's Chinese Settlement, where you can learn about the lives of Chinese gold miners in the 19th century. The area features informative displays and restored buildings that provide a glimpse into the past.

Spend some time exploring the local art galleries in Arrowtown, showcasing works by talented New Zealand artists. This is a great opportunity to find unique pieces to take home as a reminder of your trip.
Head back to Queenstown, enjoying the stunning views of the surrounding mountains and Lake Wakatipu along the way. This is a great time to relax and reflect on your day's adventures.

Indulge in a delightful dinner at Botswana Butchery, known for its exquisite menu featuring locally sourced meats and fresh produce. The elegant setting is perfect for a family dinner, and the kids will love the variety of options available.
End your day with a peaceful evening stroll along the shores of Lake Wakatipu. The stunning sunset views over the lake and mountains create a magical atmosphere, perfect for family bonding time.
Start your day with a delicious breakfast at Vudu Cafe, known for its fresh ingredients and cozy atmosphere. Try their famous pancakes or a hearty breakfast bowl to fuel up for the day ahead.

Embark on a scenic drive from Queenstown to Milford Sound, taking in breathtaking views of the Fiordland National Park. The journey will take approximately 4 hours, so enjoy the stunning landscapes along the way.

Experience the majestic beauty of Milford Sound on a boat cruise. Marvel at the towering cliffs, cascading waterfalls, and possibly spot some wildlife like dolphins and seals. This is a must-do activity for any Lord of the Rings fan, as the scenery is truly cinematic!

After the cruise, visit the Milford Sound Visitor Centre to learn more about the area's unique ecosystem and its significance in the Lord of the Rings films. It's a great place to pick up some souvenirs and fangoods related to the movies!
Head back to Queenstown, reflecting on the day's adventures. The drive back offers a different perspective of the stunning landscapes you passed earlier.
End your day with a cozy dinner at The Cow Restaurant, famous for its delicious pizzas and rustic ambiance. It's a perfect spot to relax and share stories from your day with the family.

Start your day with a hearty breakfast at Vudu Cafe, known for its delicious coffee and fresh, locally sourced ingredients. The atmosphere is cozy, perfect for families to relax before a day of shopping.
Explore Queenstown Mall, a vibrant shopping area filled with local boutiques and souvenir shops. It's a great place to find unique gifts and memorabilia, especially for fans of the Lord of the Rings.
No visit to Queenstown is complete without trying the famous Fergburger. Enjoy a gourmet burger made with fresh ingredients, perfect for refueling after a morning of shopping.
Take the gondola up to Skyline Queenstown for breathtaking views of the region. Enjoy the stunning scenery and consider trying the luge for some family-friendly fun!
Head to the Lord of the Rings-themed shop in Queenstown to find exclusive merchandise and collectibles. It's a must-visit for any fan of the series!
Enjoy a cozy dinner at The Cow Restaurant, famous for its rustic charm and delicious pizzas. It's a great way to end your trip with a family meal in a warm atmosphere.
